topic.title: How to Use This Guide to Edit Videos in CapCut
topic.shortdesc: This is a beginner-friendly guide that explains how to create short social media videos using CapCut on an iPhone. These instructions are designed for college students with little to no editing experience.

section.title: Purpose of This Guide
section.p: This guide teaches beginner users how to create social media videos in CapCut through a series of step-by-step topics. Users will learn how to create a project, organize clips, add text and music, apply transitions, and export videos for social media platforms like TikTok or Instagram.

section.title: Who This Guide Is for
section.p: • Beginner college students with little or no editing experience
• Users creating content for TikTok or Instagram Reels
• Intermediate users who want a quick review of editing basics

body.section:
Estimated Time
Task Time
Starting a Project 1-2 minutes
Editing clips 5-10 minutes
Adding Text/Music 5-10 minutes
Exporting 2-3 minutes
.

p.b: 1. What Is CapCut and Why Use It for Social Media Editing?
3. Basic Video Editing Concepts for Beginners
4. How to Download CapCut and Create a New Project
5. How to Import and Arrange Video Clips
6. How to Add Text, Music, and Sound Effects to a Video
7. How to Add Transitions and Effects
8. How to Export a Video for TikTok or Instagram
9. CapCut Terms, Icons, and Recommended Export Settings

section.title: Common Problems
section.p: • If CapCut cannot access photos, check app permissions.
• If the app freezes, restart CapCut.
• If exporting fails, check storage space.
